Main

Source: Best Oasis Limited

[Page 2]
MARKET SUMMARY
INDIA
The Indian ship recycling market witnessed reduced buying interest this week,
primarily due to the significant strengthening of the USD, making imports more
expensive for local buyers. Market participants remain cautious as the strong dollar continues to weigh on
sentiment and purchasing appetite. The DASR (Document of Authorization for Ship Recycling) process remains ongoing,
with completion expected within the next two to three months.
